name: Fluffy Vegetable Medley
recipeIngredient: 1 tbsp grated onion (or 1 tsp. onion flakes)
recipeInstructions:
1. Dissolve jelly powder in boiling water in a bowl.
2. Stir in salt and sugar.
3. Add cold water.
4. Whisk or beat in salad dressing to combine.
5. Chill until slightly thickened.
6. Beat with rotary beater until fluffy.
7. Fold in cabbage, carrots, celery, cucumber, and onion.
8. Pour into mold or serving bowl.
9. Chill.
Note: Jelly may be completely set then put in a blender to fluff before adding vegetables. It will make it nice and airy but it won't increase the volume as much. Yield: 4. Source: Company's Company Salads.
